name: WORLD OF ART JIGSAW PUZZLES
short_description: Welcome to WORLD OF ART - Learn with JIGSAW PUZZLES! Explore over 1600+ artworks, solve puzzles, test your knowledge with quizzes, and enhance your mind while enjoying classical music. New paintings added for free regularly!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the World of Art - Learn with Jigsaw Puzzles is the ultimate puzzle game for art lovers! With over 1600+ paintings included in the base game and more added with every update—no additional payments required—you can explore classical art while challenging your brain with relaxing, educational puzzles. In addition, there are almost 300 themed paintings in the DLCs, with even more coming soon!

Relax with classical music, dive into masterpieces from artists like Monet, Van Gogh, Rembrandt, and many more, while solving jigsaw puzzles at your own pace. With 4 difficulty levels ranging from beginner to expert, you can tailor your puzzle experience to your skill level.

Key Features:

  • Over 1600+ puzzles featuring masterpieces from renowned artists around the world, with more added in every update—no additional payments required.

  • Almost 300 themed paintings in the DLCs, with even more coming soon.

  • Relaxing classical music to enhance your experience with soothing sounds from Beethoven, Bach, Chopin, and more.

  • Educational gameplay: Learn to recognize famous paintings and artists while improving your cognitive skills.

  • 4 difficulty levels: From 12 pieces for beginners to 300 pieces for experts. Rotate puzzles for a real challenge!

  • Daily quests, leaderboards, and achievements to keep you engaged as you solve puzzles and collect your own gallery.

  • Customizable settings: Personalize your background, colors, and statistics to make the experience uniquely yours.

  • DLCs such as Pixel Art by Numbers, 3D Puzzle, Jigstris, and more, offering a variety of additional content to enjoy.

Perfect for everyone: Whether you're looking for a relaxing experience, a brain training game, or a fun way to introduce children and seniors to art, World of Art - Learn with Jigsaw Puzzles offers a versatile and enjoyable puzzle experience for all.

Why Play World of Art?

  • Art history: Learn about the great painters and timeless masterpieces of classical art.

  • Brain training: Sharpen your mind and improve focus with stimulating puzzle-solving gameplay.

  • Fun for all ages: Clear instructions make it easy for children and adults to enjoy. It's the perfect game for family-friendly entertainment.

  • Customization: Personalize your gameplay, track your progress, and enjoy relaxing music while solving puzzles.

No need to leave your home to enjoy high-quality jigsaw puzzles and classical music—World of Art is here to bring both education and fun to your fingertips.

supported_languages:
English*, Polish, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, French, Italian, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Korean, Norwegian, Romanian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Croatian, Estonian, Icelandic, Latvian, Lithuanian, Slovak, Slovenian, Indonesian
*languages with full audio support
